Zo Computer

@zocomputer

The companion that gets things done. Works for you 24/7. Schedules meetings, cleans your inbox. Builds apps and automations in minutes. Use our app or text Zo.

CommunityNYC[zocomputer.com](https://t.co/rlwet5RuBw)
